raw_events.name: Salt Marsh Opera presents Cinderella
raw_events.description: Salt Marsh Opera performs Gioachino Rossini's classic — operatic enchantment in the intimate Black Box.
raw_events.notes: Local opera company, intimate venue. Strong arts pick.

raw_events.name: Annie Hartnett Author Talk
raw_events.description: Author talk at the Contemporary Theater Company, 327 Main St.
raw_events.notes: Annie Hartnett is a published novelist (Rabbit Cake, Unlikely Animals). Decent weeknight draw.

raw_events.name: Greg Piccolo & Heavy Juice — 75th Birthday Celebration
raw_events.description: Saxophonist Greg Piccolo (Roomful of Blues alum) celebrates his 75th with Heavy Juice and a pre-release of his new album. The Knick is in full programming form post-renovation.
raw_events.notes: Headliner candidate: milestone birthday + album pre-release + The Knick narrative continues.

raw_events.name: The Psychology of Serial Killers — Dr. Rachel Toles
raw_events.description: A live show by clinical psychologist Dr. Rachel Toles unpacking the psychology of serial killers. Macabre and weirdly compelling.
raw_events.notes: Headliner candidate: highly unusual programming, good narrative hook.

raw_events.name: Paul Gilbert with Greg Koch
raw_events.description: Mr. Big guitarist Paul Gilbert announces a new album WROC, joined by guitar virtuoso Greg Koch. Outlandish instrumental fireworks in a 400-seat historic theatre.
raw_events.notes: Headliner candidate: nationally known guitarist, intimate room. VIP experience also listed (sales ending soon — urgency hook).

raw_events.name: Surf & Sand Stoneware Pottery Painting Workshop
raw_events.description: Stoneware pottery painting workshop. Themed Surf & Sand.

raw_events.name: Leonie Swann Author Talk — Three Bags Full
raw_events.description: Book discussion and movie screening for the cult sheep-detective novel Three Bags Full.
raw_events.notes: Quirky afternoon arts pick. Pairs well with a long lunch.

raw_events.name: A Band Called PoP
raw_events.description: Multi-decade pop and rock favorites — early-evening dance-floor energy at the newly reopened Knick.
raw_events.notes: Solid Saturday-night option, good for groups.

raw_events.name: Speakeasy Choir — You're the One That I Want
raw_events.description: Collaborative chorus learns and performs a song from Grease — the kind of community sing that makes people remember why they like people.

raw_events.name: In Lieu of Flowers
raw_events.description: Indie band In Lieu of Flowers at the all-ages Pump House. $15 advance / $20 at the door.

raw_events.name: Dudemanbro w/ Professor Roots
raw_events.description: Late-night show at the Mist with Dudemanbro and Professor Roots.
raw_events.notes: Picked up via Eventbrite since Ocean Mist's own calendar didn't render. Confirms the Mist is back up and running for the season.

raw_events.name: Led Zeppelin — Houses of the Holy (Tribute)
raw_events.description: A note-for-note recreation of Led Zeppelin's Houses of the Holy at the Courthouse Center.
raw_events.notes: Classic-album tribute series — Courthouse has Van Morrison and Springsteen tributes following weeks.

raw_events.name: Kingston Hill Gardeners Annual Plant Sale
raw_events.description: Perennials lovingly cultivated in members' gardens. The classic Mother's Day-weekend plant sale.

raw_events.name: Plein Air Painting in the Gardens
raw_events.description: Outdoor painting at the Azalea Gardens — peak bloom is happening right now.
raw_events.notes: Azalea Days are running — peak bloom timing. Mother's Day weekend angle.

raw_events.name: CVRRENT Film Fest
raw_events.description: Film festival with band performance at Surf Exchange Cafe.
raw_events.notes: Surf Exchange is a newer venue — worth tracking.

raw_events.name: Mother's Day Brunch at Weekapaug Inn
raw_events.description: Family-style brunch with waterfront views. $95/person. Reservations required.
raw_events.notes: Spotlight candidate — best Mother's Day option in South County. Pricey but the iconic local choice.

raw_events.name: Mother's Day Brunch at Wickford on the Water
raw_events.description: Mother's Day brunch menu at the waterfront Wickford spot.
raw_events.notes: Alternate Mother's Day pick — more accessible price point than Weekapaug.

raw_events.name: RI Grown Farmers Market — Fishermen's Memorial
raw_events.description: Weekly Sunday farmers market — early-season offerings: plants, flowers, RI seafood, spring vegetables, honey, maple syrup. Mother's Day morning at the market is a tradition.
raw_events.notes: Recurring Sunday market through Oct 11. Pair with Mother's Day brunch coverage.

raw_events.name: Speaker Series: The Face of a Nation — How Gilbert Stuart Shaped America's Image
raw_events.description: South Kingstown USA250 Committee speaker on Gilbert Stuart and early American portraiture. Free.
raw_events.notes: Local-history weeknight pick. Gilbert Stuart was born in North Kingstown — direct South County tie.

editorial_notes: manual-additions.json is stale (still dated March 19, 2026) and the only forced item is a literal 'Example:' placeholder for Shelter Harbor Inn. NOT included in raw events. Editor should refresh this file with real placements before next scout, or confirm there are no advertiser placements for issue #3.
Mother's Day (Sunday May 10) is the dominant seasonal hook this week — lean into brunches, plant sales, garden events.
The Knick is in full post-renovation programming swing — Greg Piccolo (Fri) and A Band Called PoP (Sat) back-to-back. Continued narrative.
Friday May 8 is unusually loaded: Greg Piccolo, Paul Gilbert, AND The Psychology of Serial Killers all compete. Headliner pick will be hard.
United Theatre's Now Playing only shows May 3 — no May 7-13 film schedule yet posted. Skip film picks unless we find one elsewhere.
Ocean Mist calendar still not rendering. Picked up Dudemanbro via Eventbrite. Editor should verify the rest of their week via @oceanmistbar Instagram.

upcoming_notable.notes: Grammy-winning New Orleans brass legends. Tease for next week.

upcoming_notable.name: Dance Night at The Knick — Eight to the Bar + UNITED Big Band
upcoming_notable.notes: Album release for 'Jazz on a School Night.' Big tease — this is a Knick narrative beat.

upcoming_notable.name: Misquamicut Drive-In Season Opener — Jaws
upcoming_notable.notes: First night of drive-in season. Pure Signal material — tease hard.

upcoming_notable.name: Poppy Champlin's Hot Mic Comedy ft. Stacy Kendro
upcoming_notable.notes: Comedy night — variety for the lineup.

upcoming_notable.notes: Sold out — mention only as proof of regional demand or skip.
